name: Suparburoot Chao Din
original_name: สุภาพบุรุษชาวดิน
overview: The story of one person with a fighting heart. Even though there are many obstacles in life But he never gave up fighting evil. To live with dignity...with the teachings of his mother and the goodness he chose to be his refuge in life.

trailers.title: สุภาพบุรุษชาวดิน [Official Trailer]
